summary: As with the 2-business-day rat response metric, this rate improved sharply starting FY24 after NYCHA stood up a dedicated rapid-response rat team (October 2023) and consolidated its exterminators under one Pest Control Department, both driven by deadlines in NYCHA's 2019 consent agreement with the federal Department of Housing and Urban Development.

sources.label: U.S. Dept. of Justice, "Manhattan U.S. Attorney Announces Settlement With NYCHA and NYC"

oneLiner: increasing sharply after NYCHA created a dedicated rapid-response rat team
